steps.title: Identify the defining detail
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that Marisol is fascinated by the bold colors of Latinx culture and pop art, and this passion translates into her artworks. The blank must describe what this passion produces.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Vivid—meaning striking and bright—matches the bold and rich colors the passage emphasizes. Reserved contradicts boldness, unknown contradicts her artistic production, and definite addresses clarity rather than visual character. That confirms A is correct.
